plan: Plan 2 — Full Mobile MacBook-Off Parity Runtime

subsections.name: Coding / Workbench parity
subsections.auth_status: Bearer token required for all /v1/workbench/* routes
subsections.data_storage_dependency: SQLite session store; OMNIX_WORKBENCH_ARTIFACT_BUCKET for artifacts
subsections.connector_dependency: GitHub (CROSS_DEVICE_LIVE); repo clone required for file edit
known_blockers: No mobile-native IDE shell — coding task must go through chat/frontdoor
file_edit is CLOUD_LIVE (not CROSS_DEVICE_LIVE) — requires cloud execution context
Terminal exec requires approval_token; no push-notification channel for approval on mobile yet
Fargate backend must be running for MacBook-off execution
subsections.required_next_patch: Mobile task submission form for workbench plans; approval notification routing
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: POST /v1/workbench/plan from iPhone Safari returns 200 with session_id; status poll returns result

subsections.name: Connector / task parity
subsections.auth_status: Bearer token required; connector OAuth tokens stored in ~/.openjarvis/
subsections.data_storage_dependency: OAuth tokens local to MacBook; not synced to cloud
subsections.connector_dependency: Gmail, Calendar, Slack, GitHub: CROSS_DEVICE_LIVE. GDrive, Notion: UNKNOWN_NEEDS_PROOF
known_blockers: OAuth tokens stored locally — not accessible from cloud/Fargate without secure token sync
GDrive and Notion connector status unverified (UNKNOWN_NEEDS_PROOF in Plan 9 matrix)
Connector re-auth from mobile not implemented (OAuth redirect would need HTTPS + callback URL)
subsections.required_next_patch: Secure connector token export to cloud vault; mobile OAuth callback handler
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: GET /v1/connectors/status from iPhone shows authenticated connectors; POST /v1/frontdoor/submit routes task to connector

subsections.name: File / workspace / data parity
subsections.data_storage_dependency: Local filesystem + OMNIX_WORKBENCH_MEMORY_BUCKET (S3, configured). Full workspace not synced.
known_blockers: Full workspace file sync to S3 not implemented — only git-tracked files via repo operations
File index is local-only (repo path); cloud index requires separate indexing job
Mac-only unsynced files remain QUEUED_MAC_ONLY permanently per Plan 9 acceptance
subsections.required_next_patch: Cloud file index via git-tracked file list; S3-backed workspace artifact store for sessions
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: GET /v1/files/index from iPhone returns indexed file list; POST /v1/coding/files/read returns file content from cloud

subsections.name: Memory / context / routing parity
subsections.auth_status: Bearer token required for /v1/memory/*; /v1/continuity/macbook-off-status is public
subsections.data_storage_dependency: Primary: SQLite (local). Cloud sync: OMNIX_WORKBENCH_MEMORY_BUCKET (S3). Semantic: Pinecone (key present).
known_blockers: SQLite primary store is local — cloud sync to S3 requires explicit sync trigger
Full bidirectional sync not verified post-Plan 9
Context injection from cloud memory to cloud-executed tasks not verified
subsections.required_next_patch: Verify cloud memory sync works end-to-end (write on mobile, read on desktop and vice versa); snapshot sync trigger
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: Memory written on iPhone appears in GET /v1/memory/retrieve on desktop within 60s

subsections.name: Life-Business OS operation parity
subsections.data_storage_dependency: SQLite local; no cloud sync implemented for life-os data yet
subsections.connector_dependency: None required for basic task management
known_blockers: Life-OS data (tasks, workstreams, goals) stored in local SQLite — not synced to cloud
No push notification for task updates on mobile
Mission control real-time updates not streamed to mobile
subsections.required_next_patch: Cloud sync for life-os data store; mobile-optimized task management UI
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: Task created on iPhone visible on desktop; task created on desktop visible on iPhone

subsections.name: Voice / tap-to-speak parity foundation
subsections.data_storage_dependency: DEEPGRAM_API_KEY present; JARVIS_STT_PROVIDER configured; JARVIS_TTS_PROVIDER configured
known_blockers: Full wake word and TTS is PARKED (Plan 3) — do NOT reopen
Foundation only: tap-to-speak (browser MediaRecorder → /v1/voice/transcribe) not wired in mobile UI
Audio permissions require HTTPS on mobile browsers
TTS playback requires Web Audio API on mobile — not yet wired
subsections.required_next_patch: Wire browser MediaRecorder → POST /v1/voice/transcribe in mobile UI (foundation only, no wake word)
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: Tap-to-speak button in mobile UI captures audio, sends to /v1/voice/transcribe, populates chat input

subsections.name: Notifications / approval parity
subsections.auth_status: Bearer token required for approval actions
subsections.connector_dependency: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN present (push notifications via Telegram); SLACK_BOT_TOKEN present
known_blockers: Approval store is local SQLite — not synced to cloud for MacBook-off case
Push notifications (Telegram/Slack) exist but not triggered on new pending approvals
No polling/WebSocket push from mobile to watch for new approvals
PWA push notification API not wired
subsections.required_next_patch: Telegram notification trigger on new approval queued; mobile approval polling (every 30s)
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: New pending approval on desktop triggers Telegram notification; Bryan can approve from iPhone via /v1/approvals/{id}/approve

subsections.name: Long-running cloud execution parity
subsections.data_storage_dependency: Mac worker queue: local SQLite. Fargate backend: OMNIX_WORKBENCH_AWS_PROFILE + AWS_REGION configured.
known_blockers: Mac worker queue processes tasks only when MacBook is online and process is running
Cloud execution daemon not deployed to Fargate (only API is deployed, not worker process)
No long-running job status webhook/push for mobile polling
DAG and batch orchestration routes are cloud-safe but require Fargate worker for execution
subsections.required_next_patch: Deploy worker process to Fargate or implement serverless job dispatch; add SSE/WebSocket status stream for mobile
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: Long-running task submitted from iPhone completes while MacBook is off; result visible on iPhone

subsections.name: Deployment / release / signing workflow parity
subsections.connector_dependency: GITHUB_TOKEN present; AWS profile configured for ECS deploy
known_blockers: Tauri app build and signing require MacBook with Xcode/codesign — cannot run on Fargate
Apple signing certificate in local keychain — not accessible from cloud
ECS/Vercel deploy (non-signing) could be triggered from mobile with approval gate — not yet wired
Self-upgrade route exists but triggers local script — not safe from mobile without cloud CI
subsections.required_next_patch: Wire cloud deploy (ECS only, no signing) to be triggerable from mobile with approval gate; Tauri signing stays QUEUED_MAC_ONLY
subsections.proof_for_acceptance: ECS backend redeployment triggered from iPhone returns 200 after approval; Tauri signing correctly rejected from mobile

global_auth_state.cloud_auth: Same Bearer token used against AWS ECS Fargate backend
global_auth_state.missing: No OAuth/JWT/multi-user; single-user API key only

macbook_off_summary.global_blocker: Primary data stores (memory, approvals, life-os, connector tokens) are local SQLite — cloud sync required for MacBook-off parity
